div.h2: Per-FD Connection Table: Flat Array Indexed by File Descriptor
div.p: conn_t conn_table[MAX_CONNS=10240] — O(1) lookup, direct index by fd number
O(1) Lookup conn_get(fd) = &conn_table[fd] Single array index — no hash, no search

Cache Behavior Warning sizeof(conn_t) ≈ 4128 bytes = 64.5 cache lines 10K connections → 40MB working set Sparse access pattern → L3 misses per dispatch Each active conn: ~200 cycle DRAM penalty if cold
Memory Layout BSS segment (zero-init at load time) 10240 × 4128 = 42 MB total On-demand paging: only active slots fault physical pages; idle slots = 0 cost
